title: Techniphilia Core
description: The core mod of a technology-filled series.
body:
The backbone of the Techniphilia series. Required for all Techniphilia mods.

- **Techniphilia Core** (this mod)
- **Techniphilia Travel** (coming soon to Modrinth)
- **[Techniphilia Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/techniphilia-tools)**
- **Techniphilia Base** (coming soon to Modrinth)

Can be used standalone. Adds copper, tin, bronze (unobtainable without other mods), aluminum (also unobtainable), and hammers (only uses vanilla and Techniphilia materials). Techniphilia Tools is still recommended.
